2140150.name: RetroRange
2140150.description:
RetroRange is a casual retro cyberpunk sandbox first-person shooter with object-destructive physics.

If you are looking for a Casual shooter experience then look no further than RetroRange. A variety of firearms to choose from and lots of different objects to shoot and pick up and move around.

Features:

Shooting: Firearms included are Pistol, AK, Auto Shotgun, Sniper Rifle, Pump Shotgun

Loads of objects and targets to shoot, pick up and move.

The scope in mind with RetroRange was to make what Thomas Brush says your "first game". This is definitely not a AAA game. RetroRange is more like a Prototype and was developed as a learning experience for 788 Garage Studio. This project is no longer in development and will remain as an Early Access due to being a Prototype. Those who purchase this game will help support 788 Garage Studio in future games and software development.
2140150.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
